title: Record Status
description:
This plugin allows you to tell other players on a server if you are recording. 
/record true - enables the recording status. Your name when you press tab is red and other players are alerted. 
/record false - disables recording status
body:
This plugin allows you to tell other players on a server if you are recording. 
/record true - enables the recording status. Your name when you press tab is red and other players are alerted. 
/record false - disables recording status

This plugin is for servers, it is not a mod.
